team.date_founded: Founded on fast-spinning, egg-shaped Haumea, where the dizzying rotation shaped a unique wide-area game.
team.number_of_fans: Around 5 million, as restless as their spinning world.
team.badge: An elongated ellipse spinning around a bright core, motion-blurred.
team.home_kit: Bright white and electric-yellow with a spiral motion pattern.
team.history: Haumea Spinners play a giddy, attacking, wide-area game born of their fast-spinning world. They stretch the pitch end to end and side to side, whirling opponents into dizziness with relentless offensive movement. It is exhausting to watch and worse to mark.
team.club_culture: Restless, attacking, and dizzyingly energetic. The Whirl never stop moving.
team.political_leaning: Kuiper-frontier libertarian — fast, free, and allergic to being held in place.
trophy_cabinet: A reputation for the most chaotic, attacking football in the Kuiper
legends: Spin Halloran — the winger who reputedly never stood still
achievements: Highest-scoring side in the Kuiper Belt

stadium.date_built: A frontier ground on the spinning dwarf's equator.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the rotation-survey and ice-mining outfits.
stadium.pitch_size: Wide and long, built to exploit the whirling wide game.
stadium.bio: The Oval is an elongated, dizzying ground where the home side's relentless wide movement and the world's fast spin combine to leave visitors reeling.

training_facility.date_built: A basic facility on the fast-rotating equator.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded modestly by local mining outfits.
training_facility.bio: The Oval Athletic Centre drills relentless wide movement and rotation, conditioning players for the giddy, attacking whirl that defines the club.

manager.appearance: Energetic and quick, paces the touchline as restlessly as her team plays.
manager.bio: Ellipse Yamamoto is an attacking zealot who builds wild, wide, offensive sides that whirl opponents dizzy. Caution is a foreign word; the Spinners attack until someone falls over.
manager.playing_history: A flying winger who never tracked back in her life.
manager.playing_philosophy: Attack wide, attack everywhere, and spin them until they break. Defence is for the timid.
manager.culture: An attacker who believes in joy over caution.
achievements: Built the Kuiper's most thrilling attack

managing_staff.appearance: Lean and tireless, drills movement in the spinning gravity.
managing_staff.bio: Spin Larsen masters rotation dynamics, conditioning the Whirl to keep moving wide and fast for the full ninety minutes.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Movement is everything. Keep spinning and they can't catch you.

players.appearance: Alert and proactive, sweeps behind a high line.
players.bio: Gyro Reyes is the balanced sweeper-keeper who covers the space the all-out attack leaves behind.
achievements: Most sweeper actions in the Kuiper

players.appearance: Tireless and flying, an attacking full-back.
players.bio: Spiral Torres is the workhorse full-back who whirls up and down the wide right all match.
achievements: Most attacking-third touches by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the rare anchor.
players.bio: Rotate Okafor is the team-first defender who tries to hold order behind the whirl.

players.appearance: Combative and willing, the bite at the back.
players.bio: Whirl Kane is the aggressive defender who covers the chaos with sheer effort.
Twist Rivera is the composed defender who tries to anticipate the whirl's own chaos.

players.appearance: Inventive and mobile, the creative whirl.
players.bio: Spin Chen is the creative engine who keeps the wide attack flowing in dizzying patterns.
achievements: Most chances created in the Kuiper

players.bio: Orbit Petrov is the team-first midfielder who covers the ground the attack abandons.

players.appearance: Balanced and busy, the spinning pivot.
players.bio: Pirouette Morales is the composed midfielder who keeps the whirl from spinning out of control.
achievements: Highest pass completion in the side

players.bio: Blur Yamamoto is the selfish striker who finishes the whirling chaos with deadly speed.

players.appearance: Direct and ferocious, the storm forward.
players.bio: Cyclone Nakamura is the aggressive forward who spins defences apart alongside the strikers.
achievements: Most fouls won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and rapid, the wide weapon.
players.bio: Storm Fischer is the selfish wide forward who whirls in from the flank to score.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Twirl Tanaka is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Reel Kim is the team-first deputy who tries to keep order when the starters rest.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Swivel Osei is the promising young defender learning to ride the whirl.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Cartwheel Park is the creative deputy who fits the wild attack from the bench.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Pivot Beck is the eager young finisher pushing for a place in the whirl.
